allow: Bash(python3 -c "from docx import Document; print\('python-docx import ok'\)")
Bash(claude -p --tools "WebSearch" --output-format json --max-budget-usd 0.01 "What is 2+2? Answer with just the number.")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Result length:', len\(data.get\('result', ''\)\)\) print\('Web searches:', data.get\('usage', {}\).get\('server_tool_use', {}\).get\('web_search_requests', 0\)\) print\('Result preview:', data.get\('result', ''\)[:200]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Result length:', len\(data.get\('result', ''\)\)\) print\('Web searches:', data.get\('usage', {}\).get\('server_tool_use', {}\).get\('web_search_requests', 0\)\) print\('Cost:', data.get\('total_cost_usd', 0\)\) print\('Result preview:', data.get\('result', ''\)[:300]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if line: import json try: data = json.loads\(line\) t = data.get\('type',''\) if t == 'result': print\('RESULT:', data.get\('result',''\)[:300]\) print\('Searches:', data.get\('usage',{}\).get\('server_tool_use',{}\).get\('web_search_requests',0\)\) elif t in \('tool_use', 'tool_result'\): print\('TOOL EVENT:', t, data.get\('name',''\), str\(data\)[:100]\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json raw = sys.stdin.read\(\) try: data = json.loads\(raw\) print\('Searches used:', data.get\('usage',{}\).get\('server_tool_use',{}\).get\('web_search_requests',0\)\) print\('Result:', data.get\('result',''\)[:300]\) print\('Cost:', data.get\('total_cost_usd',0\)\) except Exception as e: print\('Error:', e\) print\('Raw:', raw[:200]\) ")

Bash(claude -p --model sonnet --dangerously-skip-permissions "Search the web for climate information about Baiyin City in Gansu Province China. Include annual rainfall and temperature data.")
